benchmark.name: Senior Engineer Bench
benchmark.tagline: Can the agent rewrite a vibe-coded production codebase from first principles?
benchmark.scoreExplainer: Graded rewrite of a real vibe-coded codebase that needed a senior engineer. A human senior engineer scores high 80s to low 90s.
benchmark.curatedNote: Every publishes these scores in prose (Vibe Check articles), not as data. This table is hand-curated from their published numbers.
